en.extract:
The dambo cisticola or cloud-scraping cisticola (Cisticola dambo) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae. It is found in Angola, the DRC and Zambia. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical seasonally wet or flooded lowland grassland.

The '''dambo cisticola''' or '''cloud-scraping cisticola''' ('''''Cisticola dambo''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Cisticolidae]]. It is found in [[Angola]], the [[Democratic Republic of the Congo|DRC]] and [[Zambia]]. Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical seasonally wet or flooded lowland [[grassland]].
